programme.title: Inside the token surge: Where does the money flow in AI?
programme.desc: From \"OpenClaw\" to open-source AI agents, token demand is exploding. But where's the real money? \nCGTN x top AI experts on the AI gold rush, key players, and the inside track on where the money flows. Listen now.

programme.title: Day 1 at Hainan Expo – Let's check out the Canada Pavilion!
programme.desc: As this year's Guest of Honor at Hainan Expo 2026, Canada is making its biggest-ever appearance with a 400-square-meter national pavilion, bringing together nearly 40 companies and brands.\nFrom pet food and cosmetics to agricultural products and health supplements, the pavilion offers a diverse, one-stop consumer experience. Come with us inside the Canada Pavilion and see what's worth adding to your wishlist.

programme.title: China-Chic Ignites Hainan! When Chinese Trends Meet the World
programme.desc: A China-Chic boom is taking over Hainan!\nThe 6th Hainan Expo features its first-ever China-Chic Pavilion, where Chinese style shines through. From trendy toys, porcelain, silk to brocade, these creative pieces blend traditional craftsmanship with modern design. They highlight the unique charm of Eastern aesthetics and show the world the creativity of Chinese trends. What sparks will fly as China-Chic meets the globe? Follow CGTN live at the expo and join this stylish encounter between East and the world.

programme.title: Ad Break
programme.desc: Ad Break.

programme.title: Boao Forum for Asia 2026 | Investing in China to Share the Future
programme.desc: Against the backdrop of a new landscape of globalization, the strategies of foreign-invested enterprises in China have undergone a profound transformation. The continued growth of China and Asia has enabled even greater possibilities for foreign enterprises. CGTN host Lily Lyu moderates the panel discussion themed “Investing in China to Share the Future” at the Boao Forum for Asia this year, engaging in discussions with representatives on how foreign enterprises can position China and Asia as key hubs for innovation through deep, multi-dimensional integration. #BoaoForum2026.

programme.title: Boao Forum for Asia 2026 | Investing in China to Share the Future
programme.desc: Against the backdrop of a new landscape of globalization, the strategies of foreign-invested enterprises in China have undergone a profound transformation. The continued growth of China and Asia has enabled even greater possibilities for foreign enterprises. CGTN host Lily Lyu moderates the panel discussion themed “Investing in China to Share the Future” at the Boao Forum for Asia this year, engaging in discussions with representatives on how foreign enterprises can position China and Asia as key hubs for innovation through deep, multi-dimensional integration. #BoaoForum2026.
